news.title: Ubisoft is reportedly closing two studios and restructuring another, with around 380 people expected to be laid off

news.desc: Two of Ubisoft's smaller studios, Ubisoft Winnipeg, and Ubisoft Belgrade, are being shuttered. Insider Gaming was first to break the news, but reports from Game Developer, and VGC have shed more light on the broader impact. Read more
